languages.text: {n}На плохо выбритых щеках Яруба проступает испарина.{/n} "Смекаю, о чем вы. Я и сам думал: раз уж моя жизнь для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} ничего не стоит, то и терять мне нечего. Меч украду и поминай, как звали. Двину на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g}, заложу там его за приличную сумму и начну новую жизнь, подальше от всех этих ужасов. Боец из меня все одно никудышный, а кающийся грешник — тем более".

traits.locale_text: {n}На плохо выбритых щеках Яруба проступает испарина.{/n} "Смекаю, о чём вы. Я и сам думал: раз уж моя жизнь для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} ничего не стоит, то и терять мне нечего. Меч украду и поминай, как звали. Двину на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g}, заложу там его за приличную сумму и начну новую жизнь, подальше от всех этих ужасов. Боец из меня все одно никудышный, а кающийся грешник — тем более".

languages.text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."

languages.text: {n}El resplandor del sudor cubre las mejillas afeitadas a trompicones de Jarub.{/n} «Sé lo que quiere decir. Yo he pensado lo mismo: si mi vida no vale nada para el {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, no tengo nada que perder. Pillaré la espada y desapareceré. Iré a {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g}, la venderé por un buen pellizco y empezaré una nueva vida lejos de todos estos horrores. No es que el combate haya sido nunca lo mío, ni tampoco arrepentirme de lo que hago».
languages.original_text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."

Yo he pensado lo mismo: si mi vida no vale nada para el {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, no tengo nada que perder. Pillaré la espada y desapareceré. Iré a {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g}, la venderé por un buen pellizco y empezaré una nueva vida lejos de todos estos horrores. No es que el combate haya sido nunca lo mío, ni tampoco arrepentirme de lo que hago».

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布那胡子拉碴的脸颊上渗出汗水。{/n}“我明白您的意思。我也这么想过，反正我这条命对{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}来说一文不值，那还有什么好顾忌的。我去偷那把剑，然后销声匿迹。去{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}找个地方卖个好价钱，远离这些破事，开始新生活。反正我从来都不是打仗的料，也不是个喜欢反省自己的人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布那胡子拉碴的脸颊上渗出汗水。{/n}“我明白您的意思。我也这么想过，反正我这条命对{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}来说一文不值，那还有什么好顾忌的。我去偷那把剑，然后销声匿迹。去{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}找个地方卖个好价钱，远离这些破事，开始新生活。反正我从来都不是打仗的料，也不是个喜欢反省自己的人。”

languages.text: {n}L'éclat luisant de gouttes de sueur apparaît sur les joues mal rasées de Jarub.{/n} « Je vois très bien où vous voulez en venir. Je me suis fait la même réflexion : puisque ma vie vaut pas un clou aux yeux de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, j'ai rien à perdre. Je vais m'emparer de l'épée et disparaître dans la nature. Ensuite, je rallierai {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Castel{/g}, où je la vendrai à bon prix avant de prendre un nouveau départ loin de toutes ces horreurs. Après tout, j'ai jamais été très doué pour me battre, et encore moins pour apprendre de mes erreurs. »
languages.original_text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'éclat luisant de gouttes de sueur apparaît sur les joues mal rasées de Jarub.{/n} « Je vois très bien où vous voulez en venir. Je me suis fait la même réflexion : puisque ma vie vaut pas un clou aux yeux de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, j'ai rien à perdre. Je vais m'emparer de l'épée et disparaître dans la nature. Ensuite, je rallierai {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Castel{/g}, où je la vendrai à bon prix avant de prendre un nouveau départ loin de toutes ces horreurs. Après tout, j'ai jamais été très doué pour me battre, et encore moins pour apprendre de mes erreurs. »

languages.text: {n}Jarub'un yamalı tıraşlı yanaklarında ter damlaları beliriyor.{/n} "Nereye varmaya çalıştığınızı biliyorum. Aynı şey benim de aklımdan geçti: Madem hayatımın {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} için bir değeri yok, kaybedecek hiçbir şeyim de yok. Kılıcı araklar ve ortadan kaybolurum. Kendimi {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'a{/g} atar, orada iyi bir fiyata okutur ve tüm bu dehşetlerden uzakta yeni bir hayata başlarım. Ne de olsa savaşmak veya hatalarımdan ders çıkarmak hiç bana göre olmadı."
languages.original_text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub'un yamalı tıraşlı yanaklarında ter damlaları beliriyor.{/n} "Nereye varmaya çalıştığınızı biliyorum. Aynı şey benim de aklımdan geçti: Madem hayatımın {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} için bir değeri yok, kaybedecek hiçbir şeyim de yok. Kılıcı araklar ve ortadan kaybolurum. Kendimi {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'a{/g} atar, orada iyi bir fiyata okutur ve tüm bu dehşetlerden uzakta yeni bir hayata başlarım. Ne de olsa savaşmak veya hatalarımdan ders çıkarmak hiç bana göre olmadı."

languages.text: {n}Auf Jarubs schlecht rasierten Wangen bilden sich Schweißperlen.{/n} "Ich weiß, worauf Ihr hinauswollt. Ich hatte denselben Gedanken: Nachdem mein Leben für das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} keinen Wert hat, habe ich nichts zu verlieren. Ich werde das Schwert stehlen und verschwinden. Ich fliege nach {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, verkaufe es für ein stattliches Sümmchen und beginne weit weg von all diesem Schrecken ein neues Leben. Ich war ohnehin nie ein großer Kämpfer und neige nicht dazu, meine Fehler zu erkennen."
languages.original_text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."

Ich hatte denselben Gedanken: Nachdem mein Leben für das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} keinen Wert hat, habe ich nichts zu verlieren. Ich werde das Schwert stehlen und verschwinden. Ich fliege nach {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, verkaufe es für ein stattliches Sümmchen und beginne weit weg von all diesem Schrecken ein neues Leben. Ich war ohnehin nie ein großer Kämpfer und neige nicht dazu, meine Fehler zu erkennen."

languages.text: {n}ジャラブの頬に汗の光が浮かぶ。{/n}「わかってるよ。俺もそう思った。俺の人生は{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}にとって価値がない。だから、何も失うものはない。剣を盗んで消えてやる。{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}足跡{/g}で売って、そこでお金を稼いで、この惨状から離れて新しい人生を始める。俺は、そもそも戦ったり、自分の過ちを認めたりするような人間じゃない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."
